sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82679" key="*persole/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Περσ-ολέτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n82679.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">destroyer of Persians</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:3:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
